title: Suburban Guidance — Explore
description: After arriving in W2, the shopkeeper tells the party to explore the neighborhood and watch out for the HOA.

lines.speaker: Surplus Shopkeeper
lines.text: New here? The neighborhood is laid out on a grid. Elm, Oak, Maple, Birch. The important places are the school on Maple Lane and the community center on Cedar.

lines.speaker: Surplus Shopkeeper
lines.text: Watch out for the appliances. They've been going rogue since the HOA started 'community restructuring.' The crossing guard on Birch Court is the first real test.

lines.speaker: Surplus Shopkeeper
lines.text: And whatever you do, don't ignore the memos. They're not just paper. They're how the Coordinator keeps track of everything.
